summary: Completed comprehensive testing of multi-role user features for CarryOn estate planning app. All 15 backend API tests passed. All 10 frontend UI checks passed. Test user fulltest@test.com successfully shows: (1) 'Welcome to Your Estate' tile on dashboard, (2) OnboardingWizard with 'Get Started with CarryOn', (3) ViewSwitcher dropdown in header, (4) Beneficiary data populated in benefactor's portal.
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py (Line 26-38): _user_response correctly computes is_also_benefactor using db flag OR owns_estate
auth.py (Line 156-159): Login endpoint correctly checks estate ownership for multi-role flag
auth.py (Line 869-935): /auth/me endpoint returns is_also_benefactor and is_also_beneficiary fields
server.py (Line 155-201): /debug/user-state endpoint provides diagnostic data with build hash for cache-busting
OnboardingWizard.js (Line 190-207): 'Welcome to Your Estate' tile renders when user.is_also_benefactor is true
DashboardPage.js (Line 431): ViewSwitcher properly placed in dashboard header next to EstateSelector
ViewSwitcher.js (Line 16-17): isMultiRole correctly checks user?.is_also_benefactor || user?.is_also_beneficiary

test_credentials.test_account: fulltest@test.com / Password.123 (bypasses OTP via trust token)

seed_data_creation: None - using existing test user fulltest@test.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-role user features fully tested and working. Test user fulltest@test.com has role='benefactor' with is_also_benefactor=true. Dashboard shows: (1) OnboardingWizard with 'Get Started with CarryOn' at 4/6 complete, (2) 'Welcome to Your Estate' tile explaining benefactor/beneficiary view switching, (3) ViewSwitcher dropdown in header showing 'My Estate' as active. Beneficiaries page shows 1 configured beneficiary 'Test Beneficiary' with full contact details. Estate ID: 9a560550-c664-4d84-897f-33628442b8c5.
